subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest the Beloved of the worlds lying beneath the swords of the ungodly, and hearest the lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری مقصود العالمین تحت سیوف المشرکین و تسمع ضجیج
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
